data.title: Roger Stone wants Mark Kelly’s “execution” after Trump’s crypto haul criticism
data.description:
Roger Stone has called for the “execution” of Democratic Senator Mark Kelly after his criticism of United States President Donald Trump’s crypto haul. Stone, a Republican strategist, mentioned this because the lawmaker accused Trump of cashing in on his tokens from a position of power in the White House. According to previous reports, the Arizona […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/roger-stone-wants-mark-kellys-execution-trump/

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches bull token
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana Ecosystem's MEME token bull. Users can start trading in the chain trading section.
Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.description:

data.title: Belo Horizonte City Council Approves Bitcoin Incentive Bill
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Belo Horizonte City Council in Brazil has passed a bill related to Bitcoin with a vote of 20 in favor, 8 against, and 6 abstentions. The legislation aims to incentivize businesses that accept Bitcoin payments by promoting them in city advertising campaigns. Additionally, the bill proposes educational initiatives to assist citizens in adapting to digital transformation. The bill now awaits final approval from the mayor's office.

data.title: Turbos Launchpad's seventh project RWADEPIN will be launched today
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sui Ecosystem Project Turbos Finance announced on the X platform that its zero-commission IDO platform Turbos Launchpad has launched the seventh project RWADEPIN. The project has a $100 investment threshold, a combination of Ethereum and SUI technology, and a complete RWA ecosystem covering trading markets, Launchpad, Launchpool and master nodes to create a low-threshold, high-efficiency one-stop real-asset investment platform.
This IDO will start at 19:00 on May 10th, Beijing time, and end at 19:00 on May 13th. The IDO fundraising unit price is $0.007, TGE unlocks 30%, and the remaining 6 months are linearly released. Users are supported to participate using USDC and TURBOS.

data.title: 413,032 Americans Affected As Major Data Breach Leaks Customer Names, Social Security Numbers, Financial Records and More
data.description:
Hundreds of thousands of Americans are now at risk of identity theft and fraud after a major data breach at a human resources firm. In a new filing with the Office of the Maine Attorney General, Maryland-based Kelly Benefits says it has discovered a significant cybersecurity incident impacting 413,032 people.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/10/413032-americans-affected-as-major-data-breach-leaks-customer-names-social-security-numbers-financial-records-and-more/

data.title: Ethereum (ETH) Price Targets $4,000 After Breaking Key Resistance Levels
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) price finally broke the $2K barrier, trading at around $2,300 after going past critical resistance. This raises hopes it could climb to $3,000 and $4,000. The sharp move up started after the Federal Open Market Committee’s decision to hold interest rates steady on May 7 led to an across-the-board risk-on digital assets
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/10/ethereum-eth-price-targets-4000-after-breaking-key-resistance-levels/
